name: Veggie or Casserole Topper
recipeIngredient: 1/3 Cup Dry Bread, Cracker or Cornflake crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bacon in a 2-cup glass measure. Cover with paper towel.
2. Microwave on high for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring midway through cooking, until the bacon is crisp. Remove the bacon and reserve it.
3. Discard all remaining bacon drippings. Add garlic and microwave on high for 1 minute.
4. Add bread crumbs, Italian seasonings, black pepper, and reserved bacon; mix thoroughly.
5. Sprinkle over cooked vegetables such as green beans, Brussels sprouts, or broccoli. Alternatively, top a casserole during the last 3-4 minutes of microwaving with this mixture. Makes 2/3 cup.
